穿越末世的王晨意外觉醒了，多游戏枪战系统都是前世玩过的各种游戏枪战系统。
真理只在大炮之内，区区丧尸看我钢铁洪流。
什么？你说这个世界上有天命之子，而我是大反派？
某气运之子：“我的钢铁之躯，无人可挡。”
王晨：“把我的AX拿过来，我看看是AX的伤害高还是他的身体硬。”
某气运之子：“10年之期已到，华夏颤抖吧。”
王晨：“哪来的龙王，看我钢铁洪流！”
某气运之子：“我能统领百万丧尸！”
王晨：“启动要塞核弹看我给你们轰平了。”
（注：崩坏三和使命召唤只联动角色，没有各种科幻武器。）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6adbc0c74f8e74b6382b241e3ea39928","author":"映雪绽星","author_id":"","book_id":"7481497512981843006","book_name":"末世中我觉醒了暗区三角洲系统","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202018","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1599人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7481497547945542206","read_count":"1599","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"352824"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.2","serial_count":"167","tags":"动漫衍生,系统,穿越,末世,反派,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o2d16d26d0ea9ff80147384ba28c1fa3c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779309712&x-signature=gJdlRTJLxeEBY%2FYBW2IzYF5lzY8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4295157589749566","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"23"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032204415256D39C8F1C918371190E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":12,"forwarded_count":
